chunks.title: Call to Battle and Warning
chunks.reason: Introduces the oracle against Babylon with a call to gather armies and announces the nearness of Yahweh's day.

chunks.title: Description of Destruction
chunks.reason: Describes the cosmic signs, human terror, and specific acts of violence that will occur during the judgment.

chunks.title: The Medes and Babylon's Ruin
chunks.reason: Identifies the Medes as the instrument of judgment and describes the permanent desolation of Babylon.
